title: Trump reports about $1.4bn in crypto income as digital assets eclipse property
summary: Beyond crypto, the filing catalogued the more familiar Trump portfolio, including about $122 million from the Doral golf resort in Florida, $77 million from Mar-a-Lago, $4.7 million from branded watches, and $86.5 million in legal settlements, as reported across the disclosure’s hundreds…
